Gun_DKF_Reprimand.label: Reprimand SMG
Gun_DKF_Reprimand.description: Standard-issue 9mm submachine gun used by Doberkin Federation forces. High rate of fire and excellent close-quarters performance, but limited effectiveness against armored targets.

Gun_DKF_Cluster.label: Cluster Shotgun
Gun_DKF_Cluster.description: Heavy combat shotgun designed for devastating close-range engagements. Extremely effective against unarmored targets, but quickly loses efficiency at range.

Gun_DKF_ComradeArms.label: Comrade Arms Pistol
Gun_DKF_ComradeArms.description: Heavy-caliber sidearm delivering strong stopping power. Reliable backup weapon with good penetration for a handgun.

Gun_DKF_Overwatch.label: Overwatch Rifle
Gun_DKF_Overwatch.description: Standard service rifle of the Doberkin Federation. Balanced performance, good accuracy, and reliable range make it an excellent all-purpose kinetic weapon.

Gun_DKF_Typhoon.label: Typhoon Rifle
Gun_DKF_Typhoon.description: Automatic rifle optimized for sustained fire and battlefield suppression. Delivers a higher volume of fire at the cost of precision and ammunition efficiency.

Gun_DKF_Eruptor.label: Eruptor Launcher
Gun_DKF_Eruptor.description: Compact explosive launcher firing specialized grenade rounds. Effective against groups and light cover, but costly to sustain in prolonged engagements.

Gun_DKF_Mauler.label: Mauler Heavy MG
Gun_DKF_Mauler.description: Heavy machine gun firing large-caliber rounds. Built for suppression and sustained fire, but extremely heavy and resource-intensive.

Gun_DKF_AT_Rifle.label: AT Rifle
Gun_DKF_AT_Rifle.description: Anti-materiel rifle designed to penetrate heavy armor. Extremely powerful but slow, heavy, and expensive to operate.

Gun_DEF_HeartBurn.label: HeartBurn Rifle
Gun_DEF_HeartBurn.description: Energy-based rifle delivering intense thermal damage. Effective against most targets with improved penetration compared to conventional firearms.

Gun_DEF_HellFire.label: HellFire Weapon System
Gun_DEF_HellFire.description: High-output energy weapon designed for area denial and sustained thermal damage. Consumes significant resources and rewards disciplined use.

Gun_DKF_CommanderSidearm.label: Commander Sidearm
Gun_DKF_CommanderSidearm.description: Elite sidearm chambered in .700 Smart rounds. High penetration and precision, but costly to field and limited in capacity.

Gun_DEF_Lancer.label: Lancer Precision Weapon
Gun_DEF_Lancer.description: High-energy precision weapon capable of penetrating heavy armor. Slow to operate, but extremely effective against high-value targets.

Gun_DEF_Arbiter.label: Arbiter Pulse Rifle
Gun_DEF_Arbiter.description: Advanced pulse rifle offering excellent precision and penetration. A high-tech alternative to conventional service rifles.

Gun_DEF_RedGlare.label: Red Glare Launcher
Gun_DEF_RedGlare.description: Heavy launcher firing high-energy explosive projectiles. Extremely destructive, but slow, heavy, and logistically demanding.

Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.label: 9mm Reprimand (FMJ)
Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.description: Standard full metal jacket 9mm round for the Reprimand. Balanced damage, low cost, and moderate penetration.

Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_AP.label: 9mm Reprimand (AP)
Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_AP.description: Armor-piercing 9mm round for the Reprimand. Reduced damage, but markedly improved penetration against protected targets.

Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Buckshot.label: 12-gauge Cluster (buckshot)
Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Buckshot.description: Close-range anti-personnel shell loaded with multiple pellets. Devastating in close quarters, but ineffective at range.

Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Slug.label: 12-gauge Cluster (slug)
Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Slug.description: Single heavy projectile for the Cluster shotgun. Better range and penetration than buckshot, but less forgiving.

Ammo_45_Comrade_FMJ.label: .45 Comrade Arms (FMJ)
Ammo_45_Comrade_FMJ.description: Standard .45 full metal jacket ammunition. Good stopping power and reliable general-purpose performance.

Ammo_45_Comrade_HP.label: .45 Comrade Arms (HP)
Ammo_45_Comrade_HP.description: Hollow-point .45 ammunition optimized for unarmored targets. High tissue damage, but poor penetration.

Ammo_Overwatch_FMJ.label: Overwatch rifle (FMJ)
Ammo_Overwatch_FMJ.description: Standard rifle ammunition for the Overwatch. Accurate, efficient, and suitable for most battlefield situations.

Ammo_Overwatch_AP.label: Overwatch rifle (AP)
Ammo_Overwatch_AP.description: Armor-piercing rifle ammunition for the Overwatch. Better against armored enemies, though less efficient for routine use.

Ammo_Typhoon_FMJ.label: Typhoon rifle (FMJ)
Ammo_Typhoon_FMJ.description: Standard automatic rifle ammunition for the Typhoon. Intended for sustained fire and suppression.

Ammo_Typhoon_AP.label: Typhoon rifle (AP)
Ammo_Typhoon_AP.description: Armor-piercing Typhoon ammunition. More effective against protected targets, at increased cost.

Ammo_Eruptor_HE.label: Eruptor grenade (HE)
Ammo_Eruptor_HE.description: High-explosive grenade round for the Eruptor. Concentrated blast, useful against clustered targets and light structures.

Ammo_Eruptor_Frag.label: Eruptor grenade (frag)
Ammo_Eruptor_Frag.description: Fragmentation grenade round for the Eruptor. Wider anti-personnel effect, but less effective against armor.

Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.label: 20mm Mauler MG (FMJ)
Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.description: Standard large-caliber rounds for the Mauler. Built for sustained suppression and raw firepower.

Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.label: 20mm Mauler MG (AP)
Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.description: Armor-piercing heavy machine gun ammunition. Better penetration against armored targets, with reduced raw damage.

Ammo_20mm_ATRifle_AP.label: 20mm AT Rifle (AP)
Ammo_20mm_ATRifle_AP.description: Dedicated anti-materiel armor-piercing ammunition. Designed to defeat heavy armor and durable structures.

Ammo_20mm_ATRifle_APHE.label: 20mm AT Rifle (APHE)
Ammo_20mm_ATRifle_APHE.description: Armor-piercing high-explosive anti-materiel ammunition. Lower penetration than pure AP, but more versatile on impact.

Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Standard.label: Doberkin energy cell (standard)
Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Standard.description: Standard energy cell for Doberkin thermal weapons. Stable, reliable, and broadly effective.

Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Overcharge.label: Doberkin energy cell (overcharged)
Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Overcharge.description: Overcharged energy cell delivering increased damage and penetration at higher cost and lower efficiency.

Ammo_ArbiterCell_Standard.label: Arbiter cell (standard)
Ammo_ArbiterCell_Standard.description: Standard pulse cell for the Arbiter. Accurate, efficient, and technologically advanced.

Ammo_ArbiterCell_Overcharge.label: Arbiter cell (overcharged)
Ammo_ArbiterCell_Overcharge.description: Overcharged pulse cell for the Arbiter. Higher lethality and penetration, intended for elite use.

Ammo_700Smart_CS_Standard.label: .700 Smart Sidearm
Ammo_700Smart_CS_Standard.description: Elite smart ammunition for the Commander Sidearm. Delivers strong penetration and premium battlefield performance.

Ammo_LancerCell_Standard.label: Lancer cell
Ammo_LancerCell_Standard.description: High-output precision energy cell for the Lancer. Rare, expensive, and highly effective against armored targets.

Ammo_RedGlare_HE.label: Red Glare grenade (HE)
Ammo_RedGlare_HE.description: High-energy explosive plasma grenade for the Red Glare. Extremely destructive and resource-intensive.

Ammo_RedGlare_Frag.label: Red Glare grenade (frag)
Ammo_RedGlare_Frag.description: Fragmentation plasma grenade for the Red Glare. Optimized for anti-personnel use with a wider damage footprint.
